title: Reforged++
description: A collection of forge mods handpicked for performance, creativity and CHAOS!
body:
![An image of the Reforged++ logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aa61f0f2964fc67d701193c0eaac3bd4e3e8e64.png)
### This is a modpack which aims to provide an enhanced survival experience without quests or any set goals, a perfect start to modding without the fuss of figuring out compat and such.

### Features legendary mods such as:
- Create
- Alex's mobs and caves
- L_Ender's Catalysm
- Farmers delight
And many, many more...
### 
### Some main features of this modpack are:
- Easy multiplayer hosting
- Far render distance with great performance
- Custom compat for many different mods
- Built with stability in mind, as I actively play and test this pack
- No complicated quests or forced objectives
- Overhauled biomes and better generation
- Shaders (_Pretty!_)
### If making a new world, enable the provided datapacks in the datapacks folder!
This is not vanilla+, It's _vanilla++_
